name: Marinated Chicken
recipeInstructions: Combine the first five ingredients. Pour the marinade over the chicken; cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or longer, turning occasionally. Drain the marinade from the steak and reserve. Arrange the chicken in a 2-quart oblong baking dish. Bake, uncovered, at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes. Lower the oven temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Remove the chicken; brush with the reserved marinade. Cover the dish with foil and bake for an additional 35 minutes. Remove the foil during the last 5 minutes of baking. Makes 4 servings.
